meta.title: AI 硬件产业链知识图谱 — Serenity(@aleabitoreddit) 覆盖版
meta.built_from: 6192 条全档案推文蒸馏 + 原文验证

stance_legend.satellite: 卫星仓/线索仓(小仓或观察)
stance_legend.signal_only: 当信号源/需求端,非主要持仓

meta.note: 倍数/市值为 Serenity 本人推文自述,非独立核验

money_flow_map: 超大厂Capex(GOOGL/META/MSFT/AMZN) → NeoCloud算力(NBIS) → 连接(ALAB/CRDO) → GPU/ASIC(NVDA→AVGO→MRVL) → 存储HBM(MU/SK/三星/SNDK) → 光模块(LITE/COHR/AAOI) → CPO/激光源(SIVE/TSEM/FOCI) → 外延/衬底(IQE→AXTI/SOI) → 原料(日本化学4092/高纯铟) → 代工封装(TSM/AMKR/TOWA) → 功率电力(HPS.A/VRT/XLU) → 核能(LEU/OKLO)

L0_原料化学品.desc: 卡点的卡点 —— 最上游原料,中国控盘

companies.name: Nippon Chemical Industrial
companies.position: InP 衬底原料关键供应商
companies.importance: 卡点的卡点;约 $169M 市值即可控制
companies.serenity_view: NCI is the bottleneck of the bottleneck

companies.name: 7N 高纯铟/磷(大宗)
companies.importance: 用 SMM 现货价创新高作 InP 紧张先行指标
companies.serenity_view: 盯上海有色网 7N 铟价破历史新高=InP 涨价前兆

L1_衬底晶圆材料.desc: 最赚钱板块 —— 化合物半导体衬底/外延

companies.name: AXT Inc
companies.product: InP 衬底(矿物→提纯→生产端到端)
companies.position: 控 40%+ InP,与 Sumitomo 双寡头(60-70%)
companies.importance: AI buildout 的 single point of failure;中国出口管制+特朗普EO 迫 Emcore 剥离→准垄断

companies.name: Sumitomo Electric
companies.importance: 与 AXTI 共控 InP 衬底供给
companies.serenity_view: bottlenecked by two companies: AXTI + SMTOY

companies.name: IQE plc
companies.position: 衬底→激光的外延环节;LITE 已知供应商
companies.importance: $179M 对标台 LandMark $3.5B;qualification cycle 是隐藏价值
companies.serenity_view: Point72/UBS 在 ATH 买入验证;YTD 峰 +837%

companies.name: Soitec
companies.position: CPO 硅光路线西方虚拟垄断
companies.importance: AXTI 的硅光镜像;TSEM 2.9亿预付锁产能传导

companies.name: NGK Insulators(碍子)
companies.position: 下一代光调制材料衬底
companies.importance: TFLN 调制器领域实质性垄断;光通信下一代
companies.serenity_view: 中日文披露: 稳拿 TFLN 晶圆领域,列为'实质性垄断'标的

L2_激光光源.desc: CPO 最深卡点 —— 激光器与外延设备

companies.name: Sivers Semiconductors
companies.product: InP CW DFB 激光阵列(ELS)
companies.position: 全球少数 DFB 供应商;供 JBL 1.6T/MRVL/Ayar
companies.importance: CPO 超级周期最清晰拐点;首 3 月营收 +77%
companies.serenity_view: 头号旗舰仓,once-a-generation long, I'm not selling a single share;$140M→~$2.1B

companies.name: Lumentum
companies.position: 控 EML 供给;GOOGL TPU 供应商
companies.importance: CEO: sold out until end of 2027;NVDA $2B 注资验证
companies.serenity_view: $49→$614;隐藏垄断,每个 TPU 都需 LITE

companies.name: Coherent
companies.product: EML 激光+金刚石散热衬底
companies.position: 与 LITE 并列激光卡点
companies.serenity_view: MRVL 和 COHR 是 the Deloitte of Semis

companies.name: MACOM
companies.importance: 投 $45M 入股 IQE 入董=验证 epiwafer 卡点

companies.name: Riber
companies.importance: MSFT Quantum 秘密供应商(现场照放大发现)

companies.name: Veeco
companies.position: 外延设备双寡头另一极

companies.name: AIXTRON
companies.serenity_view: 刻意回避: 偏好高Beta标的而非AIXA这类设备/慢爬坡股

companies.name: Applied Optoelectronics
companies.importance: 垂直整合自有激光;H1-2027 $471M 营收建模

companies.name: Jabil
companies.position: SIVE 论点核心验证(用 Sivers 光源)
companies.serenity_view: GTC/OFC 泄露 Jabil 1.6T 用 SIVE 光源

companies.name: POET Technologies
companies.position: 易被设计绕过的伪卡点
companies.importance: 单客户集中(MRVL)+ designed-out 风险

L4_CPO光子代工检测.desc: 2026 头号主题 —— CPO 共封装光学;Optical TAM 9X($15b 2026→$154b 2028)

companies.name: Win Semiconductors
companies.position: 坐在几乎所有关键卡点上
companies.serenity_view: 全球最重要代工厂之一

companies.name: MSSCorps
companies.position: 功能性垄断,目标 90% 份额

companies.name: FOCI Fiber Optic
companies.position: 台湾 CPO 隐形供应链

companies.name: Shunsin
companies.position: 台湾 CPO 隐形供应链
companies.importance: 光封装环节(日本散户无法买入)
companies.serenity_view: CPO 封装,NVDA CPO 链中罕见已 derisk 标的

companies.name: 古河电工(5801.T)
companies.serenity_view: 中日文披露: 下一轮轮动指向 CPO/MTSI/古河电工

companies.name: Marvell
companies.position: 连接激光源与超大厂 ASIC

companies.name: Broadcom
companies.position: AI 牛市传导链 NVDA→AVGO→TSM 中间环
companies.importance: 可 $280-290M 收购 SIVE 控制卡点

L5_GPU算力连接.desc: 算力本体与连接 —— 多作信号源,偏好上游而非 GPU 本体

companies.name: NVIDIA
companies.importance: 每次注资/发言预示下一卡点(HBM→CoWoS→激光)
companies.serenity_view: 当信号源,本体多列 Hold/Sell

companies.name: Astera Labs
companies.importance: 76% 利润率,144%+ 增长,客户全 Mag7
companies.serenity_view: 早期 core,14% 超买后清仓反手做空

companies.name: Credo
companies.product: AEC 有源电缆/高速 I/O
companies.position: AI 连接,与 ALAB 同段
companies.serenity_view: CES 颜色谣言-25.7%加仓,markets trade off Kindergarten logic

L6_存储HBM.desc: 内存超级周期 —— 组合曾占 35%

companies.name: SanDisk/WDC
companies.importance: Q3 营收 $4.6B vs 估 $2.9B 大爆

L7_代工封装测试.desc: 制造底座 —— 代工/先进封装/测试

companies.name: TSMC
companies.position: 底层 monopoly,一切 AI 算力依赖
companies.serenity_view: 被低估的垄断,neocloud 交易中心

companies.name: (玻璃衬底设备)
companies.product: 玻璃衬底 TGV 设备

L8_功率电力能源.desc: AI 数据中心电力主题 —— 功率半导体/变压器/电力/核

L9_NeoCloud算力运营.desc: Hyperscaler Capex Funnel —— 早期最高信念主题

companies.name: Cipher Mining
companies.serenity_view: 获利后清仓集中进 NBIS

L10_超大厂需求源.desc: 需求终端+资金源头 —— capex 洪流起点

companies.name: Alphabet
companies.position: 需求源+TPU 自研(供应链终点)

L11_应用与相邻主题.desc: 应用层与相邻投机/价值主题

companies.name: (边缘 AI 硬件)
companies.product: 边缘 AI agent 硬件

companies.name: Circle
companies.importance: 私人部门美联储,$18B市值10x+空间

companies.name: Hims & Hers
companies.serenity_view: 可能复制 OPEN/GME 轧空

companies.name: Harmonic Drive Systems
companies.product: 谐波减速器(机器人关节)
companies.importance: 机器人运动核心部件;亲赴日本实地调研
companies.serenity_view: 中日文披露: 日本 Harmonic Drive 调研进展顺利

companies.name: Stratasys
companies.importance: 供 Boston Dynamics Atlas/Meta 人形机器人骨架
companies.serenity_view: 中日文披露: 承担所有人型机器人机体骨架
